name: Zenhaven Latex
tagline: Flippable all-latex luxury mattress for the ultimate natural sleep
description: The Zenhaven is Saatva's all-natural Talalay latex mattress, featuring a unique flippable design with two firmness levels in one bed. Made from 100% natural latex, organic cotton, and organic New Zealand wool, it's one of the most eco-friendly mattresses on the market. The talalay process creates a lighter, more breathable latex that's perfect for hot sleepers seeking luxury.

specs.firmness: Gentle Firm (5/10) on one side, Luxury Plush (4/10) on the other

features: Organic New Zealand wool fire barrier
pros: Two firmness levels in one mattress
cons: Less pressure relief than memory foam
seoTitle: Zenhaven by Saatva 2026: Flippable Luxury Latex Worth the Price?
seoDescription: Zenhaven offers two firmness levels in one all-natural Talalay latex mattress. 100% organic, lifetime warranty. Explore this eco-luxury pick!
